pr363_personas.note: PR #363 (v14.3.19) shipped/finalized the full two-sided persona-blueprint.md (Coaching Mode + Agent-Governance/Task Mode) for these 10 book personas under their CANONICAL slugs, plus non-empty domain[] tags in persona-categories.json (all routable). The published prebuilt asset above (build_date 2026-06-22, release prebuilt-index-v2.0.0) PREDATES these full canonical blueprints and does NOT contain them under their canonical slugs (it embedded the older/partial versions, some under author-prefixed slugs). Until a clean canonical asset (prebuilt-index-v2.1.0) is rebuilt and published, these personas are activated PER-BOX by the Gemini indexer (22-book-to-persona-coaching-leadership-system/pipeline/gemini-indexer.py), which embeds the canonical blueprints into workspace/data/coaching-personas/gemini-index.sqlite. Verified 2026-06-26: a real Gemini indexer run embedded all 10 (647 chunks, gemini-embedding-2 @3072, 0 errors) and persona-selector-v2.py surfaced the correct persona for representative funnel / copywriting / brand-story / coaching / NEPQ-sales tasks. rohde-the-sketchnote-workbook embeds and out-scores competitors on semantic task-fit, but a separate selector category-map gap (visual-storytelling not routed by infer-task-category/_CATEGORY_DOMAINS) filters it at Stage B end-to-end — a selector enhancement, not an indexing/persona defect.

notes: Clean full-48 rebuild with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072. 48 personas / 7615 chunks / 144 source files. The published SQLite asset (sha256/asset_url/chunk_count above) holds 48 personas' embeddings: the prior 40-persona set PLUS 8 book-author personas (Brunson Lead-Funnels / Network-Marketing-Secrets / Funnel-Hackers-Cookbook / Traffic-Secrets / Marketing-Secrets-Blackbook, Miner NEPQ, Edwards Copywriting-Secrets, Dib 1-Page-Marketing-Plan). Includes Hormozi $100M Leads (99 chunks) + $100M Offers. Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box (saves Gemini API credits). Every vector is float32 @ dim 3072. SHA256 verified at build time and must be verified before install. PENDING (see pr363_personas + asset_rebuild_required): this asset predates the v14.3.19 canonical full blueprints; a clean prebuilt-index-v2.1.0 rebuild (all canonical slugs, consistent all-md embedding, de-duplicated, 87MB gz re-upload) is the remaining publish step. The per-box indexer activates the canonical personas in the meantime (verified 2026-06-26). RECONCILE 2026-06-27: canonical_persona_count corrected 53 -> 54 to match the live persona-categories.json on main (PR #375 landed one additional canonical persona after the manifest was hand-updated on 2026-06-26). persona_count (48) is unchanged because it reflects the ACTUAL contents of the still-published prebuilt-index-v2.0.0 asset, which has NOT been rebuilt; asset_rebuild_required remains true until prebuilt-index-v2.1.0 is built and uploaded.
